steps.title: Emphasize shared features
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize how two Basquiat works are similar. The notes show that both works use acrylic, so the best sentence should foreground that shared medium.

steps.title: Separate similarity from difference
steps.content: Choice B only gives dates, Choice C contrasts media differences, and Choice D compares size. The sentence saying both works use acrylic directly emphasizes a similarity. The answer is A.
